posts.content: 🇬🇧 Mistakes That Stop Students From Getting IELTS 7+ 🎯 Многие готовятся к IELTS месяцами, но score почти не меняется — проблема часто не в английском, а в подходе. ❌ Заученные essays и speaking answers Examiners быстро замечают memorized phrases — речь становится менее natural. ❌ Слишком много “сложных” слов Fancy vocabulary ≠ высокий band score. posts.summary: Many students preparing for the IELTS exam struggle to achieve a score of 7 or higher due to common mistakes in their approach. Memorizing essays and speaking answers, relying too much on complex vocabulary, lack of timed practice, ignoring strategies for reading and listening, and irregular study habits are highlighted as key pitfalls. The post emphasizes that achieving an IELTS score of 7+ requires a strategic, consistent approach with regular exam practice rather than just memorizing random words.
